name: bluewind-log-viewer
description: Root scripts to run backend and frontend together

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm test --prefix backend && npm run test:ci --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
